nl_query: For each active scanner device, show the device name, campus, total scripts scanned this month, number of rescans performed, average OCR confidence of pages scanned, and the timestamp of the last scan, filtering devices with zero scans.
failed_sql:
SELECT sd.device_name, au.name AS academic_unit, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) AS total_scripts_scanned, COUNT(CASE WHEN sh.replaced_previous THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS rescans_performed, AVG(sp.extracted_metadata->>'confidence') AS average_ocr_confidence, MAX(sh.scanned_at) AS last_scan_timestamp
FROM   scanner_device sd
JOIN   academic_unit_closure ac ON ac.descendant_id = sd.campus_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = ac.ancestor_id
JOIN   scan_history sh ON sh.device_id = sd.id
JOIN   script_page sp ON sp.script_id = sh.script_id
WHERE  sh.scanned_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month'
  AND  sh.scanned_at < CURRENT_DATE
  AND  sd.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY sd.device_name, au.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) = 0;
